title: tina different hour at every house
prompt: Image 1 is the edit target and must retain Tina, her wardrobe, face, pose, product, car interior, and neutral afternoon lighting. Image 2 is identity and candy support only. Change the continuous residential block beyond the passenger window so each adjacent property exists at a different hour: blue dawn with sprinklers, hard noon with short shadows, glowing mango-gold sunset, deep fruit-colored night with porch lights. Architecture and perspective remain continuous with no panel borders or graphic dividers. Tina occupies one normal present moment inside the car and studies the impossible sequence. Photoreal commercial styleframe, poetic and immediately legible, no labels, clocks, split screen, fantasy particles, or text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
